bugs.error_message: Dashboard shows 'Good evening, hp.patelrep@gmail.com!' instead of user's first name
bugs.root_cause: fullName.split(' ')[0] returns the whole email when fullName is an email (no spaces), which is truthy so the fallback split('@')[0] never ran
bugs.fix: Check if fullName contains '@' first; if so use split('@')[0], otherwise split on space

bugs.error_message: Full verification pass found web lint failures, dependency audit vulnerabilities, and authenticated Playwright blocked by missing TEST_PASSWORD/e2e auth state
bugs.root_cause: Conditional React hook calls after an early return; security advisories in locked dependencies; Playwright setup skips without TEST_PASSWORD and cannot create e2e/.auth/state.json
bugs.fix: Moved AICopilotBubble's /ai early return after hooks; updated root lockfile qs; upgraded API security-sensitive requirements; replaced tracked secret-looking placeholders with env-only or neutral test values. Playwright/mobile were intentionally skipped by request.

bugs.fix: Changed hover: bg-[var(--alert-soft)] transition-colors" → opacity-80 transition-opacity">

bugs.error_message: Web type-check failed: SOPDocument.updated_at missing and task user_profiles.full_name missing from TypeScript API types
bugs.root_cause: The reworked UI consumed optional fields returned by joined API payloads, but the typed client interfaces still only modeled the narrower old shape.
bugs.fix: Added optional updated_at to SOPDocument and optional preferred_name/full_name fields to Task.user_profiles.

bugs.error_message: Web lint failed: React purity rule rejected Date.now() during render in SOP page and SupervisorDashboard activity feed
bugs.root_cause: The UI computed current-time-dependent display state directly during render, which violates React's idempotent render rules.
bugs.fix: Moved SOP stale-reference time into an effect-backed state value and removed Date.now() fallback from the supervisor activity feed render path.

bugs.error_message: PowerShell rg commands failed because unquoted app route paths containing parentheses were parsed as expressions
bugs.root_cause: The app route path apps/web/app/(dashboard)/... was passed to PowerShell without quotes.
bugs.fix: Re-ran the rg commands with quoted path arguments.

bugs.error_message: Production web build failed: Turbopack could not parse apps/web/app/(dashboard)/scheduling/page.tsx due to invalid UTF-8
bugs.root_cause: A mechanical PowerShell rewrite used the shell default encoding, leaving the file with bytes that were not valid UTF-8.
bugs.fix: Detected invalid UTF-8 files with a strict UTF8 decoder and rewrote scheduling/page.tsx using UTF8Encoding(false).

bugs.error_message: Malformed Tailwind token classes remained after the frontend rework, e.g. bg-[var(--caution-soft)]0
bugs.root_cause: An earlier token replacement left invalid arbitrary-value class names with a trailing 0, so Tailwind ignored the intended colors.
bugs.fix: Mechanically replaced malformed soft-token classes with solid semantic token classes for caution, ready, alert, and info.

bugs.error_message: Undefined brand-* Tailwind classes remained after the token migration
bugs.root_cause: The handoff migrated to accent tokens, but fallback/auth/housekeeping screens still referenced the old brand color scale that is not defined in tailwind.config.ts.
bugs.fix: Mapped remaining brand background, text, border, hover, and accent classes to the new accent token classes.

bugs.error_message: PowerShell rejected git staging command that used && as a command separator
bugs.root_cause: This PowerShell version does not support && as a statement separator in the invoked context.
bugs.fix: Split staging and status into separate shell commands.

bugs.error_message: Vercel Preview build failed prerendering /_not-found: @supabase/ssr requires project URL and API key
bugs.root_cause: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, and NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL existed only for Production, while branch codex/frontend-design-handoff-rework deployed as Preview.
bugs.fix: Added branch-scoped Preview environment variables in Vercel and redeployed the failed deployment successfully.

bugs.error_message: Vercel CLI env add and redeploy commands failed with non-interactive option mismatches
bugs.root_cause: This Vercel CLI required a git branch argument for Preview env additions and the redeploy command does not support --yes.
bugs.fix: Used `vercel env add <name> preview codex/frontend-design-handoff-rework --value <value> --yes --force` and `vercel redeploy <url> --target preview`.

bugs.error_message: Plain web request to Vercel Preview returned deployment protection auth page; first vercel curl attempt used a full URL and failed
bugs.root_cause: The Preview deployment is protected, and `vercel curl` expects a relative path plus `--deployment` when targeting a specific deployment.
bugs.fix: Verified with `vercel curl /login --deployment patelrep-1lhjrssvc-henilllpatellls-projects.vercel.app`.

bugs.error_message: User reported: after clicking Sign In, clicking anything signs them out
bugs.root_cause: Auth profile hydration treated /auth/me 403 responses and network/CORS failures as fatal auth failures, then cleared the auth store and called Supabase signOut. Header and Sidebar also mounted duplicate useAuth listeners that could trigger extra auth-context calls.
bugs.fix: Centralized auth/session hydration in Providers, only signs out on true /auth/me 401 invalid-session responses, redirects authenticated no-hotel 403 users to onboarding without destroying the session, ignores transient network failures for sign-out purposes, and simplified useAuth to read the central store only.

bugs.error_message: Focused Playwright login suite failed because login page branding assertions expected old heading/text
bugs.root_cause: The login redesign moved PatelRep from a heading to logo text and changed the small product label from Hotel Operations AI to Hotel AI, while tests still asserted the old accessible structure.
bugs.fix: Updated the login e2e assertions to check logo text, the current Welcome back heading, and the current Hotel AI label.

bugs.error_message: Frontend handoff interaction audit found styled controls without full behavior: copilot:open was not listened for, hotel switcher had no dropdown, tweaks had no accent selection, and work-order kanban lacked drag/drop and AI triage.
bugs.root_cause: The first frontend rework pass focused on visual parity and left several README interaction requirements partially wired or visual-only.
bugs.fix: Wired the copilot open event, added command palette, hotel switcher dropdown, persisted accent swatches, and work-order DnD plus AI triage behavior.

bugs.error_message: PowerShell audit command failed when unquoted path apps/web/app/(dashboard) was parsed as syntax; standalone server smoke showed a blank page because static assets were not copied after next build.
bugs.root_cause: Verification used a shell path with parentheses without quotes, and the standalone smoke skipped the documented Railway static-copy step.
bugs.fix: Reran searches with quoted paths and verified the app through a clean Next dev server plus Playwright login smoke instead of the incomplete standalone artifact.

bugs.error_message: Next dev logged "Persisting failed: Unable to commit operations" with access denied while still serving /login successfully.
bugs.root_cause: Local Windows filesystem/cache persistence in Next dev hit an access-denied condition after build/dev restarts.
bugs.fix: Restarted the dev server and verified /login with Playwright and browser smoke; production build remained clean.
